name: Chicken Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones and skin from chicken breast. Cut into 1/4-inch pieces.
2. Toss together chicken, cornstarch, 1/2 tsp salt, and a dash of white pepper.
3. Heat wok until very hot. Add 1 tablespoon oil and coat the sides.
4. Add eggs. Cook and stir until eggs are thickened throughout but still moist. Remove eggs from wok.
5. Wash and thoroughly dry wok. Heat wok until very hot, add 2 tablespoons oil and coat the sides.
6. Add chicken and stir fry until chicken turns white.
7. Add bean sprouts, mushrooms, and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Stir fry for 1 minute. Remove from wok and drain.
8. Heat wok very hot, add 2 tablespoons oil, coat the sides.
9. Add rice and stir fry for 1 minute.
10. Stir in soy sauce and a dash of white pepper. Add eggs, chicken mixture, and chopped green onions with tops. Stir fry for 30 seconds.
